---
title: "Community Leaderboard"
execute:
  echo: false
format: 
  html:
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 4
    code-fold: false
---

```{r load-pkg, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
library (dashboard, quietly = TRUE)
library (lubridate, quietly = TRUE)
```

Total numbers of package submissions and reviews by community members. By
default this includes editors, with a toggle to filter out numbers from anybody
who is or has been a member of the editorial team.


```{r get-rev-history, echo = FALSE}
#| cache: false
revdat <- review_history (quiet = TRUE)
```

```{r rev-history-ojs, echo = FALSE}
ojs_define (reviews_in = revdat)
```


```{ojs}
submissions = {
    const result = transpose(reviews_in).map(row => ({
        ...row,
        date: new Date(row.date),
        submissionYear: new Date(row.date).getFullYear()
    }));
    console.log(result[0]);
    return result;
}
```


```{ojs}
viewof showEditors = Inputs.toggle({label: "Include editors", value: true})
```

```{ojs}
leaderboard = {
    const counts = new Map();
    const editors = new Set();

    const add = (handle, role) => {
        if (!handle || handle === "NA") return;
        if (!counts.has(handle)) counts.set(handle, {handle, author: 0, reviewer: 0});
        counts.get(handle)[role]++;
    };

    submissions.forEach(row => {
        add(row.aut_gh,    "author");
        add(row.reviewer1, "reviewer");
        add(row.reviewer2, "reviewer");
        if (row.editor && row.editor !== "NA") editors.add(row.editor);
    });

    return Array.from(counts.values())
        .filter(d => showEditors || !editors.has(d.handle))
        .map(d => ({...d, total: d.author + d.reviewer}))
        .filter(d => d.total > 0)
        .sort((a, b) => b.total - a.total || b.author - a.author)
        .slice(0, 40);
}
```

```{ojs}
leaderboardLong = leaderboard.flatMap(d =>
    ["author", "reviewer"]
        .map(role => ({handle: d.handle, role, count: d[role]}))
        .filter(d => d.count > 0)
)
```

```{ojs}
Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 130,
    width: 700,
    height: leaderboard.length * 26 + 40,
    x: {label: "Score (number of appearances)", grid: true},
    y: {domain: leaderboard.map(d => d.handle), label: null, padding: 0.3},
    color: {
        domain: ["author", "reviewer"],
        range: ["#4e79a7", "#f28e2b"],
        legend: true
    },
    marks: [
        Plot.barX(leaderboardLong, Plot.stackX({
            x: "count",
            y: "handle",
            fill: "role",
            tip: true
        }))
    ]
})
```
